name: Festive Frozen Mint Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 (6 oz) Ready-made Nabisco Oreo Pie Crust
2 cups Whipping Cream or Whipped Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the sweetened condensed milk, peppermint extract, and food coloring if desired.
2. Fold in the whipping cream until well mixed.
3. Pour the mixture into the pie crust.
4. Cover with foil.
5. Freeze for 6 hours or until firm.
6. Garnish as desired.
7. Store leftovers in the freezer.
